title: More Critters
description: Adds new fantasy creatures in vanilla style
body:
![mod tittle](https://i.imgur.com/FMARiC2.png)
!! Requires Geckolib !!

More Critters is a Forge mod that adds new fantasy creatures (or as we like to call them, "Critters") to Minecraft.

All of these new Critters have some sort of use to the player, have it be something as simple as food or something more complex like a new weapon. Besides just having uses, Critters also make the world of Minecraft more lively. 

There are currently 25 Critters in the mod
![critters](https://i.imgur.com/YwlyFLP.png) 

Each major update will have a theme and add new Critters around that theme.

But Critters aren't the only thing this mod adds!

Side Content:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

The Wandering Collector can be found in their wagon with their trusty Carrybug. These wagons can be found in many biomes from plains to badlands to even swamps! The Wandering Collector will buy any Critter related items from you so Critter drops are never useless. And the Carrybug can carry items and be ridden.
![Wandering Collector and Carrybug](https://i.imgur.com/xXXf1uy.png)

In the wagon chest you can find the Critter Atlas, a sort of field guide to help you learn about the Critters.

But there is something else that you might like in those chests...
![Critter Atlas](https://i.imgur.com/8iRgU5q.png)

The Critterlings are small and passive creatures that can only be found in wagon chests. They are only an ambient mob but they instantly give life to any build. They can be transfered around easily with Critterling Sacks and they even dance to music discs!
![Critterlings](https://i.imgur.com/zKLqqs9.png)

Deep underground, you might stumble upon Fossil Blocks. If broken, they have a chance to drop a Fossil. These Fossils can be placed on Fossil Displays and are excelent decorations! Hold onto them tight, they might come in handy later...
![Fossils](https://i.imgur.com/haZiAJF.png)

</details>
